name: Up and Over

movements.notes: over a 50 in log, 30 in box, and 20 in "Pig" in sequence

description: Three rounds of muscle-ups, a box jump-over sequence spanning a log, a box, and a raised platform, and GHD sit-ups.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2022/6 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; followed by an 84 ft weighted lunge with a 125 lb (women) axle bar to finish
